children.name: The Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG 'Chicago' returns in a remastered form that pays tribute to the original 1985 silhouette. Featuring the legendary white, black, and varsity red color scheme, this release captures the essence of early MJ greatness.
children.characters:
The Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG 'Chicago' returns in a remastered form that pays tribute to the original 1985
silhouette. Featuring the legendary white, black, and varsity red color scheme, this release captures the
essence of early MJ greatness.

children.name: Constructed with premium cracked leather on the ankle collar and mid-panel, this 'Lost and Found' edition simulates the look of a pair found in the back of a vintage warehouse. Each detail, from the slightly aged midsole to the muslin tongue, has been meticulously crafted to recreate a piece of sneaker history.
children.characters:
Constructed with premium cracked leather on the ankle collar and mid-panel, this 'Lost and Found' edition
simulates the look of a pair found in the back of a vintage warehouse. Each detail, from the slightly aged
midsole to the muslin tongue, has been meticulously crafted to recreate a piece of sneaker history.
